name: multi-search
description: Aggregated search MCP plugin with thin skill guidance, key health tracking, and site scraper memory.

interface.shortDescription: Search across web, repo, social, forum, Q&A, and video sources.
interface.longDescription: Multi Search exposes MCP tools for aggregated search, URL scraping, key health tracking, and site-specific scraper memory, with a thin skill for natural-language routing guidance.
defaultPrompt: Search recent discussion about an AI framework.
Find implementation options for a technical problem.
